summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.3.5 to 0.8.3.6 in Config.xcconfig. Commit message: "CI: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.8.3.6 [skip ci]".

The patch contains no code or behavior changes, so there is insufficient evidence that this will affect runtime behavior or end-user experience; human review recommended to confirm there are no downstream effects.
